---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability for the SigComply CLI
title: "feat: <short summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What are you trying to do, and where does the CLI fall short today?
     Describe the underlying need, not just a proposed solution. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to see. A new command, flag, source plugin, evidence
     type, framework, output format, etc. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short. -->

## Scope check

<!-- Optional but appreciated — helps triage against the architecture. -->

- Does this touch a source plugin / evidence type / framework / policy?
- Would it change anything sent to SigComply Cloud? (The submission payload is
  structurally counts-only and must stay non-custodial — no identifiers.)

## Additional context

<!-- Links, prior art, screenshots, related issues. -->
